summary:
The week 119 Honest Money Hour call bridged the gap between utility and growth by announcing a new pilot program to expand the mine by rewarding community members for signing up merchants to the NectarPay platform.

Key topics covered:
*   **NectarPay's Role in the Ecosystem.** The new payment platform is the first major utility for TEXITcoin, designed to profitably deploy terminals into businesses. This groundwork paves the way for future projects like Fair Money and Downtown Digital while allowing the team to test and perfect the technology on a smaller scale.
*   **A Call for Social Media Engagement.** With maturation of the project's tech, the time is right to re-engage the broader crypto world. The community of over 50,000 miners was asked to begin liking and commenting on daily posts on X (formerly Twitter) to organically boost visibility and attract new interest.
*   **Major Legal Update.** The team has filed its motion for summary disposition in the case with the Texas State Securities Board. Bobby highlighted the filing, which includes an expert CPA report, as a powerful and transparent public record of the project's model and why it is not a security.
*   **Preparing for the Next Cycle.** The team discussed the importance of having a strategy for taking profits and being psychologically ready for "sudden wealth syndrome." Community members were encouraged to think about these things now, learning from past cycles where many held on too long.
*   **New Mine Growth Pilot Program.** In a return to the project's foundational theory of building the mine, a new program was launched. Existing miners can now earn a 100 MH/s TEXITcoin mining seat for every new merchant they successfully sign up for NectarPay.

Notable moments:
Bobby kicked off the call with a candid story about finally using the StreamYard software he’d been paying for over a year, joking about his own reluctance to embrace social media tools. The theme of right-timing continued as he welcomed crypto influencer Matty, recalling that it wasn't the right time for his involvement a year ago. Now, with a more mature network and open-source code, the project is ready for the spotlight Matty can help it attract.

Bobby also shared his emotional reaction to reading the legal team's latest filing, saying it brought tears to his eyes. He described it as a masterful articulation of the project's mission and methods, viewing it not just as a legal document but as a marketing piece that lays out the entire case for honest money on the public record.

Action items / what's next:
*   Follow `@Texitcoin` on X (Twitter), turn on notifications, and engage with at least one post per day.
*   Review the latest legal update and filings on the TEXITcoin website.
*   Purchase a discounted NectarPay demo kit from the website using the code `MINETXC`.
*   Use the new referral link in the MineTXC dashboard to refer merchants to NectarPay and earn 100 MH/s of hash power per signup.
transcript: The future of payments has arrived. Every day, millions of business owners work hard to earn every dollar. But before that money ever reaches their account, Someone else takes a percentage of every sale. For years, businesses have been told that's simply the cost of doing business. We don't believe it has to be. Every swipe, every tap, every transaction, the fees add up. Thousands, sometimes tens of thousands of dollars disappear every year through processing fees. Then come delayed settlements, chargebacks, complicated statements, hidden costs, and worst of all, you still don't truly control your own money. There has to be a better way. Meet NectarPay, a modern crypto payment platform built for businesses that believe they should keep more of what they earn. No middlemen. No custodial wallets. No unnecessary complexity. Just fast, secure crypto payments sent directly to your own wallet. Because it's your business, your money, your choice. Accept crypto. Get paid instantly. Keep more. It's that simple. With Nectar Pay, you keep every penny with zero transaction fees on eligible crypto payments. Payments are sent directly to your own wallet, giving you complete control of your funds from the moment they're received. Accept Bitcoin, Texitcoin, popular stablecoins, and the next generation of digital currencies. Your customers simply tap, scan, or pay. No complicated setup. No confusing process. Just a payment experience that's fast, familiar, and secure. Transparent pricing. Real support. No surprises. But we didn't stop there. Introducing the Nectar Pay Business Boost program. Qualifying merchants can exchange their first year subscription for promotional products or services from their own business. Bring one hundred complimentary coffees instead of paying a subscription fee. We reward those offers to our Crypto Pop community. They visit your business, redeem their rewards, experience what you have to offer, and often become loyal paying customers. It's more than payment processing. It's customer acquisition. Digital payments are changing. Customers are actively looking for businesses that embrace innovation. The businesses that move first won't simply accept a new way to pay.
